review_text: Our room was clean tidy and had all the things we needed.  We had lake side hotel style rooms. . . . Well it was up the back of the property in a paddock with a dam.  First you had to follow the dirt track.  The walls were a bit thin every time someone moved in the room next door you could hear it.  I had 4 kiddos with me.  Sorry to the other guests.  I can only imagine they sounded like a heard of elephants up and down the bunk beds.  It was basic but also had its own charm about it.  If it was warmer the pool and play areas would have been fantastic.  The majority of the facilities at the front of property feel modern and well kept.

Had a really great time in the safari tent room for 4 nights. The groundsman Johnny was honestly a phenomenal human and went above and beyond to make sure customers were comfortable and well catered for. Only things I would change is the internet (could connect but couldn’t use) and some stains on towels. Would book here again!
Very bad customer service with both ladies they was very rude for no reason I will never go there anymore baddddddddddddddd customer service 👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎👎

Nice place during the day however once the sun goes down a bunch of ferral kids are running around the park being noisy, calling out, qplaying on the camp kitchen and in and out of the toilets at 9.41pm no control by parents obviously. Strangley dogs have to be controlled as per park rules.
Would not be on my list to come back
Great park. Well priced and clean. Johnny, the park representative, was friendly, helpful and loved his work. Thanks for the stay.

I spent the week there and found it was a great park, very comfortable bed in the cabin. Uber eats delivers as well.
Johnny the maintenance guru and office staff were very friendly and helpful.
thanks for having me.
Fantastic service from Renee who was cheerful and happy to help.

Stayed in there cabins while working in area
Cheaper than motels and lot better accommodation would come back again

Its pretty good, lots of families get together so the children will find some friends to hang out with, pools, vending machines. It quiet and a nice getaway from the busy world we live in. The reception is usually closed at a certain time.

Recently stayed there over the Easter weekend. We stayed in tents while one of us hired a cabin. It was a great little getaway close to home. Kids loved the pool and jumping pillow. They also loved the Easter crafts and egg hunt. All staff were super friendly and helpful. The amenities were super clean. Even though it rained a bit all the family had a great time.

Not recommended. The value for money for campers is absolutely not justified. The campsites are absolutely average; the toilet blocks are below average – cramped, stuffy and poorly maintained. The description states that the toilet blocks have been recently renovated, but that’s of little help if they’re dirty. What’s more, there is a youth hostel on the campsite which is currently fully occupied by at least 50 teenagers, meaning the small toilet block is unusable. It’s already completely overcrowded even with just a few people. The promised peace and quiet isn’t there either; the youth hostel doesn’t stick to quiet hours, you can hear shouting late into the night and it starts again from half past six in the morning. I have absolutely no objection to children, but to describe the campsite as a quiet and relaxing place is completely wrong. Disappointing, given the high price just for a campsite and poor toilet facilities.

Thanks guys we noticed such a difference to the park - we have been there numerous times and it is cleaner bins emptied amenities clean - reception staff are amazing friendly and bubbly and any problems nipped in the bud straight away! The guy ?johnny or ? Was amazing and all we need now is the sites to be filled with some sand to level a bit better and this would get our 5 stars! Thanks
Great place to send a couple of day OR WEEKS!! Relaxing
Facilities were nice and clean, really nice stay. Lady at the front desk was the nicest person and so accommodating! Would 100 percent come back and stay again.
Absolutely loved our stay, would definitely stay again
Next time I would choose a different site as our van only just fit even with giving measurements but other then that, great park and the pool was awesome!
Used my stay here as a base for exploring the local area and Sydney, which was only about  an hour away on the train. My stay was in a clean , comfortable lodge.

Easy booking, attentive consultants, quick issue resolution, and proactive communication.Cleanliness, comfortable beds, good amenities, and convenient locations. Staff at the front desk are amazing 👏  Their customer service is second to none.I was completely impressed with their professionalism and customer service.
Nice place
The Lovely reception team went over and above with customer service by booking us in even when we arrived just as the reception was closing, at 5pm.

Overnight cabin.
Will definitely stay again :)

Update: Stayed again!
This time on a powered site with the camper.
Kids got to use the parks pool, bouncing pillow and play equipment this time and loved it.
Will stay again...again. :)

We stayed on a powered site this time around.
The staff are amazing, the amenities are spotless and the grounds are well kept.
It is an amazing place to slow down, listen to the wildlife around you and relax 😀
This is our second stay and we will be back again.
Love this place . The whole family was comfortable. Great for family with children. Staff were excellent. I would definitely recommend this place . Thank you 😁🙏
We really enjoyed to stay in this caravan park. We were group of 25 people and celebrated NYE. The staff was great and cabins too

Beautiful little area outside of the big city.

The pool looked lovely, we just didn't find the time to enjoy it.

The site was nice and clean and the amenities building was close by. It was nice and clean and modern.

The only downside is the sinks weren't inlaid so kid can't reach the taps to wash their hands, but that's pretty minor. And the laundry facilities were expensive at $6 per load, per machine.

The permanent residents that we spoke to were just lovely (if they were staff we are so sorry for our mistake- you guys were fantastic!)

There's a bus stop right out front so access to the Taronga zoo and local attractions is easy, just the trip back is a little difficult with multiple transfers (but totally do-able!) We were suprised at how good the drive to the zoo was from this park.

My wife booked this vacation through wot if, lack of air conditioning is NOT acceptable in the summer, took my 5 year old son and the air conditioning is great in the bedroom but he was meant to be in the bunk bed at the front, now I forfeit my sleep in a bed in the bedroom so he can sleep, its 40 degrees this is NOT acceptable at all. Had I known this i would not have booked this place.

The one she booked by accident is miles from anything I paid $1500 for a trip that was awful, no amenities, no room service and I had to clean my own dishes or else they would charge. When we came into our room the dishes were dirty and needed to be washed before we could use them i guess no one cleaned them before we came in? The floor is sticky and dirty and I was worried to walk around without shoes. The cabins are loud you can hear everything happening in the next room but need to be quiet past a certain time even walking around its loud.

The roads are crazy and broken very dangerous.

Since I've been here theres been a notice saying we have internet but no internet access at all, the photos on the site are a mixture of other places and misleading. I will be leaving early this place was a waste of money I could have spent the same amount and stayed at Novotel and had a better Christmas. Pool was filthy, sauna is broken i regret booking this place.

I will NOT be back!!
The bunkbeds wernt tighting probly

We have a big rig and have stayed for a couple of periods late this year. This camp is super with great staff, great service. Very accomodating to our needs as required. Would highly recommend this Holiday Park.

Good location for Sydney
Nice place

Room was in spectacular condition. We got hit with a massive storm and experienced a large blackout for hours on end. Decided to check out at around 9pm. As me and my fiance left I realised I didn’t have my engagement ring on, last place I remember having it was the swimming pool. We drove back and I began searching the pool in the dark with a phone light for my engagement ring. An employee by the name of John saw me and began assisting me in looking for my engagement ring to which he spotted it and helped me retrieve it  Great employee and awesome to talk to, lots of help and wouldn’t have been able to find it without him. The power come back on moments later so I’m starting to believe John is some kind of higher being with magic powers. 10/10 experience.

Overall good. Clean and tidy. Perfectly reasonable but not an amazing location. It's unfortunate that the nearby Vineyard station is a one track station. But I knew this going in. Will be staying here again in the next two weeks and will update my review.

Clean, comfortable and well equipped cabins. We were pleasantly surprised with how comfortable the bed was and quality toiletry provided. We have a small but adequate fridge, microwave and surprisingly an airfryer in the studio cabin, with sufficient cutlery and crockery for 4 (there were just the 2 of us).
Staff were friendly, helpful and welcoming.
Within 5 minutes drive to 2 shopping centres with Coles/Woolies/Aldi, takeaway shops and chemists.
Location was great for us, but we were there for work, which is 10 minutes from the park. It may be different for holiday makers, expecting easy access to Hawkesbury river, which is 15 to 20 minutes drive to the closest jetty.
In saying that, for the price it costed and good access to amenities, you cannot ask for anymore.
Thank you 🙏
Very helpful team

Had a great stay here! Some of the cabins are pet-friendly, which was a big plus. The room was well-equipped with dishes, utensils, and all the basic toiletries. Highly recommend! Some good restaurants around which are also pet friendly

Great place to stay - I highly recommend. I stayed in the Studio Cabin and it everything I needed: full kitchen, large fridge/freezer, air con and heating. The park is quiet and safe with beautiful grounds. The permanent cabins are all well looked after and everyone is lovely.
The only small issue was the TV channels sometimes dropping out - I believe it’s because the WIFI connection can be a little dodgy.
But it’s a really nice place to stay and I will be back! :)

We camped here recently. The staff were friendly, but that’s about the only positive.

The amenities block was extremely dirty — clearly not being cleaned properly. There were old soap bars left behind, mud everywhere, filthy floors that looked like they hadn’t been mopped in ages, and spiders all over.

Our camp site was also dirty, with cigarette butts scattered around and a horrible sewerage smell that came and went all night. The kitchen was disgusting, and even the ensuite area was full of dust and cobwebs.

There’s not much for kids to do besides the pool, which thankfully was clean and nice. However, there were unsupervised children in the pool and some very rude older guests.

The road leading in is rough and not well maintained.
Laundry costs $6 per wash and $6 per dryer, but the dryer didn’t even dry the clothes properly.

Overall, we wish we had read the reviews before booking. I would not recommend staying here.
You get what you pay for, which is fine.

Excellent accommodation,very clean modern ,has everything you need + more,very happy with my choice of a budget cabin down the back near the lake, great value too $$..I would definitely recommend to stay here.
Love it the boss

This has been our 2nd time with our children and grandchildren.  Its our home away from home. We love it here. Its not your 5star accommodation...but its still clean and the service is excellent.  Never had any issues...we stayed in the Pool Villa's and the beds are comfortable and rooms a re very spacious. The manager, omg...shes the bomb! John the Handyman is the BEST, always doing his best when you need something done! But, its also his people skills, very polite and considerate and very helpful. Also the receptionist she was so helpful and very inviting! When you have service like that, you always want to go back! My family and I will definitely be going there again hopefully soon.😀Thankyou Avina staff for making our stay enjoyable.
Hopefully Avina will have more activities other than the games room and swimming pool. 10/10

Have stayed for over a week and have enjoyed every day.
Set up for #NRL GF .
Clean,  friendly staff that help and encouraged feedback is welcomed.

From first checking in to checking out for seven nights the place was awesome
Locals working at the park were knowledgeable of the area and activities to do although there’s plenty to do in park with pool and spa and taking in a bit of country serenity(how’s the serenity 😂😂)
Great place to stay

Our stay at Ingenia Waa okay. We were there for 2 nights and 3 days. In there they don't change bath towels every day. Only for 3 days stay or more. In other places, they change it every day whether you stay for 2 nights only. My husband, tried to ask for more at the reception they refused to give towels. ☹️ they don't clean room every day. The toilet is not good either.

However, my husband and I want to acknowledge John Oba, he's the staff there. Who is nice and accommodating. He is hard-working staff and deserve to have a pay rise. He has lots of jokes and very funny guy.

Asked to change rooms to accommodate my elderly father who has trouble climbing stairs,  and the staff changed us on the spot. Thank you so much! Super friendly staff, the cabins were clean and comfortable and the facilities are great (that pool is just phenomenal!)
Great place to stay with our fur baby. 1 bedroom cabin was excellent. Clean and lots of grassed areas to walk. Little gem of a place. Highly recommend.

Unfortunately it was continuous rain when we were here for 6 nights. The venue can't help that but the slippery mud from the roadside to the caravan was something of a hazard. Maybe some strategically placed gravel or something? Another thing the venue can't control is the entry road which, for about 100 metres or so is a minefield of craters. Better to go the slightly longer way around.

Very happy with my choice to stay at the park last week.   Many thanks to Trish, who was lovely, taking my booking over the phone and then checking me in. She found me the best site following some big rains. Staff let me enjoy my stay but also checked in to see if there was anything I needed when we met around the park. My only issue was my stay wasn't long enough and weather wasn’t hot enough to spend time by the pool.   Thank you.

Great value for money with excellent towels and linen as well as little luxuries like moisturiser as well as handwashing and lovely products in the shower dispensers. Punches well above its price point.
Great place for a stay while in Sydney.
Good value for money. Only needed somewhere to sleep and shower for 3 nights, so it fit the bill perfectly. Our cabin was down the back of the park, suited us just fine. Quiet away from everyone

Stayed here as the only other accommodation options were attached to pubs.
The accommodation was a Studio Cabin, clean and well presented but floors were still a bit damp from mopping and smelt a bit doggy.
The promised internet was non existent which was really frustrating as we stayed here for business.

Can't comment on rooms, except toilets,camp kitchen, laundry, etc. Which were very good. Nice and clean. Had a powered site. staff were excellent. Outdoor spa was great,  short drive to train station, or bus just out front if that's you. Really good spot. We will return. Cheers.
WIFI is so bad that absolutely nothing works. Room does not even have a toaster and everything that is used must be cleaned before departure. Not good at all.
Good pool, great location - well organised park
The cabin was clean and had everything that was needed. It was warm and comfortable.I had a pleasant stay.

Pros:
➡️ Fine for a one nighter
➡️ Has kids playground, pool and inflateable pillow. (Not that we used it)

Cons:
➡️ Room we stayed in smelt like cigarette smoke. That was its biggest let down.
➡️ Boom gates were broken so did really add a level of security for our parked cars
Amazing stay, so peaceful and welcoming for sure, especially when you need a safe, quiet place to stay. Especially during hard times.
We Stayed here for a night, absolutely loved the spa! Very chilled and relaxing. Staff was incredibly friendly, especially John! He was fantastic.
Caravan site was very soggy after huge rains, but John, the maintenance gent was over and above helpful, cheerful, and hard working. Our site was set up, and the van level in good time
Great affordable cabins , beautiful spot

Lovely and clean. Mattresses are comfy
Nice swimming pool, BBQ area and games room
Unfortunately we were there during the Wet period.  The road needed some attention but the staff were great 👍 👌
Great spot friendly staff, the rooms are a bit out dated bathrooms definitely need an upgrade, but overall, it was great, and has a  super comfy bed will be back

The bathroom amenities yesterday evening and this morning were absolutely filthy. Got to our booked site and found another person on our site who had been there a long time as the grass was grown around his wheels. Then moved to a “premium site” which had a big bog hole where we had to prop the caravan on bricks and timber provided by the park . Clothes all over the ground at the clothes line. I didn’t classify this as “holiday” park.

Camped here staff are friendly, but amenities block was very dirty, clearly not being cleaned properly old soap bars left behind, mud, filthy floor looks like its never mopped and full of spiders. The camp site was also dirty with cigarette butts and a disgusting sewerage smell that would come and go all night. I would not recommend staying. I wish we read the reviews first.
Terrific stay John the park supervisor was friendly professional and very helpful Staff like John made all possible

Beds weren't made, and rolled all around the room. Said it had a private balcony but didn't so there was nowhere to sit except the rolling  bed. Mozzies in the rooms which the provided spray didn't kill.

Pool was nice. Shower was hot with good pressure although awkward to get into. Close to western suburb attractions.

We arrived separately my friend with a car and 2 dogshow dogs  for dogfriendly cabin first. I came by train which was an experience ie no real station or transport for the last 2 ks to the Avina|Friend drove in from Qld very tired  but was refused early checkin ie an hour or 2 while they cleaned|Cleaned what? Were our thoughts …|Have never paid for a cabin where you arrived and had to make up your own beds either.|Sheets provided, yay!!|Door lock broken, no inside table of chairs so eating is on the rather grotty  shared verandah.|WiFi hah!|No cooking facilities and no food outlets nearby . Cramped parking opposite camping area but at least they were quiet!|Not impressed|Would kill to be staying elsewhere.
Very nice caravan park with lots of things to keep your children entertained

Booked to stay twice through the big 4 website as our start and ending stays on our way from Melbourne to Harvey bay. Disappointed. 1st visit the place was falling apart the door kept falling off the runner leaving us trapped in or out of the cabin air conditioner didn’t work has some pedal fans that did nothing so was way to hot to even sleep. |We mentioned all issues to reception and were moved cabin for remainder of stay. Was much cooler. Gave us hope for the final stay with them. ||2nd stay we had booked the poolside villa. And I’m even more disappointed. Arrived to cigarettes on deck and food crumbs on table. Fridge is hard to open because it’s jammed into the nook so close to the wall that you can access the handle to open the door. A Broken window, no microwave plate so can’t use microwave, no oven and a very small cooktop with 2x burners that doesn’t fit 2x standard sized|pots/pans on it at the same time. We had a normal size pan and a small pan but will not fit both. Checked bbq to use instead of the cooktop and it’s not been cleaned. Sliding door is a two person job to open and close. Spent around $1500 to stay here in total and am really disappointed feels a bit of a waste of money.

We stayed for 2 nights in a cabin with our dog 🐕
The cabin was clean, facilities were clean and tidy.
Trish in the office was an absolute delight 😊
John was absolutely amazing 👏 fun, happy, caring and just all round top guy!

Would absolutely stay again!

Absolute wonderful  staff
John was so funny , so freindly and nothing was a bother to him , rooms are great , clean , facilities are wonderful , clean environment,  pet freindly
definitely  be comming back
Very run down, road not really suitable for kids to ride bikes.

The roads leading to this place were some of the worst roads I've ever driven in my life!

1st, the cabbin we were given was changed last minute and it was at the rear of the property near a small stagnant pond that smelt like feral matter.
2nd our veichle was not able to reach the cabbin all the way we had trouble getting down there with the conditions of the trail.
3rd the rooms were filthy they had marks on walls, broken cupboards and shelves that we were questioned about after we left luckily I took photos upon entry to show we were not responsible.
4th when we left in the morning only to come back at lunch time OUR car park had been filled with soil and gravel and we had to park over 150m away and pushing a wheelchair all that distance over stones was extremely difficult.
5th our neighbours were partying in the cabin beside us and smoking marijuana all night and it was a very unhealthy environment for a disabled person and children.

100% would never recommend this place unless you have a 4x4.

The staff are amazing here. John is an absolute delight and because of this we decided to stay an extra day. We are struggling to leave and say good bye to them. The facilities are clean and tidy. Not too far for efficient public transport. We are really enjoying our stay. Thank you all for making it a once in a life time experience! We do hope however that if we ever get the chance to cross the ditch we will come see you again!! Highly recommend to everyone if you want an enjoyable experience an awesome holiday! From the kiwis x

Great for families. The staff were friendly and welcoming from the minute we arrived.
We arrived on a day that was 38 degrees so it was so awesome to walk into our accommodation with the AC already on!!👌 my family enjoyed it so much, that she booked a cabin straight away for the night. The bed was super comfy, that i didnt want to get up!Looking forward to booking again.👍👌😁🤗
Love it here service is great differently coming back

The price was excellent for a studio with one queen and two bunk beds. (It did look different in the photo on the website). Attending an event in a nearby suburb.

Everything was clean and I just fell into the bed as it was so comfortable. I would have a few milk available in the fridge for coffee, tea, and hot chocs.

Enjoyed the pool catching up with some laps although because i have a hip problem I did have trouble getting out. A half step would help to get out.

Pleasant environment, friendly staff. Easy to book online although the wording on the website could be a little friendlier wasn't sure if using the pea size soap, and hair products was going to be billed to me nor the tea or coffee.

The online booking process was easy, and the person to person service at the desk took all the worry out of the process.

All in all an enjoyable experience good for reps, and travellers.

Thanks Ingenia!

I stayed in the family lake view motel cabin out the far back of the caravan park. I was highly impressed with the location of the cabin, the price, and the amenities. The cabins are definitely not sound proof to the ones next to them, but we had good neighbours. I can imagine this could be an issue at times for some.
The communal kitchen was great! I do wish however that they had a communal clothesline so that we could hang up our towels after the pool and have them dry.
If I do need to come up to that area again, I would definitely stay again and would recommend it to friends and family .
I've been to many ingenia resort n have been here the most times. Great service,  great facilities.

Cabin very clean & park in a good spot for us to visit nearby relatives.
Good pool area.

My boys and myself enjoy our stay, we will be coming back again sometime in the year just to get away for a few days.

Great customer service
Pool was great to just need more seats around the pool so everyone can seat down..
It was a nice campground, just laundry wasn't good, with 2 washing machines out of service and one driver not having hot air. The rest, really good

Staff was friendly.  But the place is very, very run down and dirty.  Grey water running in the gutters ,not sure if that's up to standard . Pool was dirty never saw anyone check the levels or clean it. Will not be returning.

Als Nicht- Camper muss ich sagen, dass die Einrichtung sehr sauber war. Wir hatten eine Ensuited Powersite, Dusche und WC waren sehr sauber.

Auch der bereitgestellte Gemeinschaftsgrill war sehr sauber.

Einen Pool gibt es auch.

Die ganze Anlage liegt recht abgelegen, so dass ein Fahrzeug schon benötigt wird.

A comfortable unit with the things we required. |The units cleanliness could use some more thorough attention and not just the basics. Things like cleaning the range hood grease screens or windows, etc that you can't really expect your guests to do...

Dont ask for a late checkout. 7 night stay. Cabin was filthy, Rose the Manager was dismissive, rude and unprofessional after she handed keys to me.
Rose waited until my checkout on day seven then sent me a text saying if i didnt vacate by 10am she would call Police.  Legally you can't do that.
I've been offered and received (hopefully cleared) a refund.

ZERO STARS.
This was a nice place to stay the kids loved the pool. The bathroom could have been cleaner and the cleaner could have smiled and said hello when we did.
nice overnight stop
It's on the side of a hill. I stayed in my own van and the sites are level. Bit tight getting in. Toilets are showers clean.
Great caravan Park very affordable close to everything we needed and the staff were very very polite and will definitely be back next year..thank you ingenia holidays avina

If this place actually had a flat camp site it might get a better review||Some of the site I looked at had wheel ruts that would make it impossible to get a caravan level. ||I would suggest looking at the site before paying just to ensure that you can actually level your van
Stayed at this place twice now, once in a cabin and a few weeks ago in an ensuite camp site... Both impressed

Unfortunately I can't recommend this place. Our room was not clean and very run down. The bed in desperate need of replacement, hair on the floor, dust everywhere, beds not made for check in.
I called ahead with a question several times and either couldn't get through and left a message that was not returned or they took a message and told me they would get back to me but never did.

Definitely needs upgrading
Doors get stuck bunks unstable can not close bedroom door because of the bed tv is broken definitely not value for money at $180 night
Service is 5 star. Rose went out of her way to look after me

Disgusting! 🤢 I do not recommend to anyone! We stayed on an ensuite site for 3 nights. When we arrived we noticed the site was covered in rubbish, dirt and rocks. Like it’s never been cleaned and certainly not maintained. We have never stayed somewhere before that was so dirty on arrival. The ensuite was filthy and so outdated. Not even a single hook to hang a towel! First night we had no hot water at all and tried for a few hours but decided to use the amenities with our 2 year old in the freezing cold. The amenities are disgusting also. Spoke to reception the next day and they said “oh well that shouldn’t happen”… we are just lucky it started working again the next day.
The whole park in general is outdated. I wish I read reviews before booking because I certainly would not have booked but I thought we would be safe booking with Ingenia because we have never had issues before. The park gives Ingenia a bad name! 0 stars!!!

Stayed in a two-bedroom cabin.
HORRIBLE!
Dirty,dirty,dirty!
Couldn't bear to walk inside with no shoes.
Lino perhaps swept but rarely - if ever - mopped clean.
Used tissue on floor, used cotton bud on floor, cutlery dirty - could not use cups, mugs or cutlery without first washing them.
All terrible!
Crumbs through the drawers, crap and body hair ALL OVER the lounge such that my wife would not even sit on it with bed blankets on it.
Two redeeming factors:- unit has potential and the linen seemed clean.
Had there been an alternative venue available on the long weekend we would have left.
Oh, another thing, (there were many more), it was not possible to cook anything, on the stove, even boil water, without the smoke alarm going off. USELESS DESIGN!

PS:   To the mangement/owners... Please don't bother with a standard response saying "please accept our apologies....."
Your cleaning staff are woefully unacceptable and this type of response is nothing but hollow and cheap.
Make some changes, invite your dissatisfied guests back , perhaps at a discount rate and maybe you will be able to redeem some of them.
Maybe you should stay in one of your own rooms occasionally (we were in 22) and experience it for yourself.
Tired
Friendly,helpful staff. Nice clean and spacious facility
Very good hard to find I would go back

Ingenia Holiday Avina exceeds expectations with its exceptional accommodations, pristine facilities, and quiet location. Catering to families, the park is equipped with multiple play areas, jumping pillows, swimming pool, and and water play area. The addition of a spa and a delightful BBQ area ensures relaxation and enjoyment for all guests. A perfect destination for an unforgettable vacation experience.

Initially we were told that the powered sites were without water. Hence we purchased boxes of water for our 5 night stay. Upon checking in by a terrific young lady, I reiterated the fact that we would be without water and she confirmed it. Due to the NSW school holidays we were initially told that we would have to move after the first night. This too wasn’t the case. Upon arrival we were now given two options, one within a group of what looked like a sardine can or a position in their overflow area outside the perimeter. We set up, and were fine with the dry dirty environment, until night fall when loud noises and various men walking around carrying on like two bob watches.|My wife felt VERY unsafe and wanted to leave the following morning.|Due to the site being outside the primary camping area, walking to the toilets (accompanied by me) was not pleasant.|We left that morning and sent a note to management whom didn’t bother replying.|We would never stay there again and I’m amazed that the Ingenia group would put their names to such a dirty rundown establishment.
We went for the camping. They are all kind and good. Also, everything is good such as toilet and kitchen.

Reasonibly quiet park a long way from Sydney City, and like a lot of Sydney it’s  begging for love and attention. The roadways are in poor condition and rubbish to be found in plenty of places, the amenities block is poky and in poor condition and the services connecting spot looked sad. I didn’t get to check out the pool but it looked nice. Overall I would say overpriced for what you get.
Just want to say that the girls in the office are fabulous and very help full, park was clean, pool was well maintained 👍

Would never stay here again!!!! The only nice thing is the pool. The caravan park is extremely run down. We had a powered site and were with 2 other families that had ensuite sites. The ensuites were filthy. Looked they hadn't been cleaned in a very long time. People live in their vans in the park and they all walk and ride their bikes through your sites. The kids are constantly running through the sites and are rude.|Lots of people walking around your site in early hours of the morning. Not sure what they were doing but very suss and made to feel uncomfortable. We couldn't wait to leave.

We stayed here for 2 months in cabin 62 whilst visiting our son in hospital. We were meant to stay for 3 months but we couldn’t handle it any longer.||When we arrived the cabin was filthy. We had no hot water for the first 2 nights. The fly screens were put on wrong so we couldn’t open the windows. There was a gas smell in the cabin. The shower knobs fell off.||All these issues were fixed by the maintenance man except for tge cleaning. We did that ourselves we went and bought a mop and a vacuum cleaner. The cabin had German cockroaches in the microwave panel.|There were bugs everywhere. ||We were across from a man who was eventually asked to leave. He woukd sit in his car and drink and then shout at night.  He was very disrespectful as there were lots of other people around including families with young children. We had to call the after hours number twice for them to attend.  ||Definitely wouldn’t recommend the accomodation.

The cabin we stayed in was horrible. I had a grimy, dirty feel to it. The carpets were dirty, I couldn’t let my child play on them. Our feet went black from walking in there barefoot.
The freezer couldn’t close as it was too frosted over.
The shower door was jammed shut and needed a lot of force to open. The smell of the bathroom was low key offensive.
The skirting boards had an inch of dirt and dust on them. The base of the single bed was horribly stained. Under the single bed had rubbish and more dirt and dust.  The blinds were all tattered and broken.
The aircon unit was no match to the outside hot weather with no fans to circulate air.

We’ve stayed here before in a 2 bedroom cabin and were more than happy with our stay back then. But this has left a sour taste and we probably won’t be back in a cabin.

Had a great time here. We stayed on a lagoon site which had plenty of room. The site was a little slopey but no problem to level our van with levelers.  Close to Windsor etc. Staff were very friendly. Good for couples and family's. Plenty to keep the kits happy.

Not the best, toilets were dirty, and I didn't see anyone clean the toilets the whole time I was there. I stayed 2 nights in a powered site with my caravan. Site was good but it had rubbish on it from previous visitors which I cleaned up. No real noise issues was quite a pleasant stay. Shopping centre just down the road with a supermarket, bottle shop and takeaway options. Wifi worked a treat and I watch the big bash on my phone. Had a pool that was filled with kids having a great time so if you have kids, this looks like a fun place for them.  Would go back just needs a little more effort in cleaning the park.

Absolutely disgusting. Rooms dirty with cob webs all over the walls, oven barely works, windows disgusting, walls are peeling, mould all over the curtains, laundry pipes still in the wall, shower door doesn’t close, broken light switch, fake tiles that are peeling up, cracks all in the walls, I could die in here. Needs an upgrade badly. Absolutely would not recommend staying here. I’m never staying here again🤦‍♀️

The park and cabins were okay. A little run down and our cabin was dirty upon arrival. I’m guessing this is because the occupants are responsible for cleaning before they leave.  Overall not to bad of a place to stay but it could definitely use a little bit of tlc

Stayed with kids and a friend and her kids in deluxe cabins was great. Was ok to drive to tournament loved the pool and rooms are clean. Kids did complain the mattresses on bunks hurt from springs ended up using blankets under them. Great place to stay is being very built up around it so the country feel is disappearing. Will return and enjoy this great location. Heaps of things to do nearby and food places that are great.

Stayed 4 nights in a deluxe villa, Lots of insects and bugs in kitchen, rooms everywhere and lack of washing machine in unit made it a poor experience. Wouldnt stay here again and not recommend if you are travelling from interstate.
Love staying here. Staff are friendly and helpful. Amazing location
Decent caravan park. Didn’t love it, but in a good enough location. About 2 hours to Sydney on public transport. Close to lots of shops if you have a car.

We stayed at Ingenia Holiday Avina while our house was being sanded. The location is nice and quiet. Rooms were clean and in excellent condition. Reception was very helpful and professional. Overall stay is recommended.

Bonjour, acceuil et services super, piscine super

Mais la propreté ce n'est vraiment pas sa, je n'ai jamais vue en 2 semaine une salle de bain propre, même après être passé derrière les "employés de ménage", le sol n'a pas était fait en 2 semaines, les même touffes de cheveux était collé dans les douches pendant 4jours,

L'emplacement que nous avions réservé sur béton avait était prise par quelqu'un d'autre, alors nous avons était "surclassé"
Sauf que le terrain n'était même pas droit, sachant que nous dormions en voiture, c'était très peu confortable

En résumé, l'accueil et le service bien,
Le ménage et les emplacements en classe supérieure vraiment nul
I obtained a discount for a mid-week booking, good value for the money.

Held our kids birthday here & I can wholeheartedly say dealing with Rose was such a breeze! So prompt with her responses before the day & on the day she was such a delight to deal with! Very affordable considering its peak time of the year! Outdoor facilities were great for a kids birthday everyone had a blast! Cannot thank you enough Rose!

Love it here. Staff are friendly and very helpful. Felt very safe especially during this difficult time. We are full time travellers and this park is our base when visiting family. Close to shops such as Aldi etc. Amenities are clean and the pool area is great. Perfect for families and workers.
Good value for the price. Staff are very friendly. Awesome facilities. Highly recommended 👌 👍

Park needs a good tidy. There are broken drain pipes and tar and cement laying around. New showers are like coffins with no seating , shower curtain or mat and only a small blocked fan vet so very hot. Staff are great !
Nice size sites, friendly staff, looking forward to staying here.
Not very good, gave us what we needed near western Sydney. On suite site was Ok.

Absolutely amazing
We only had one problem with the bottom bunk springs poking out and hurting my sons back and as soon as I brought it to there attention they swapped the mattress it was not a drama for them at all very nice place will definitely stay there again
Extremely helpful customer service, comfortable beds, clean and well equipped cabins and, best of all, PET FRIENDLY!

Our site was extremely dirty - very dusty and with some rubbish, inspite there were many empty places with the grass.
It was impossible to contact with management after hours.
The caravan park is noisy. Some trucks moving during early morning and late evening.
Also, it's full of dogs barking from 6am. No one cares about that.
The kitchen appliances don't work properly: the cooktop is broken, the kettle switches off itself every few seconds.
Highly NOT recommend
Avoid

Customer service not very helpful,  they don't go above and beyond to assist you. They false advertise about the rooms you select and then chase you for payment. Rediculous. Yet my family & I stayed here before and was great,  but lately,  they are so misleading with payments, be careful everyone.
On caravan site. Lovely swimming pool and staff are very pleasant.
Stayed at this establishment due to other family members short stay requirements.

What a beautiful place clean, quiet, all the staff are lovely. If I could I would live here. Well worth the price I stayed for. Conveniently located near all shops n eateries and Emu Plains train station. I was waiting to move into an apartment so i had to ask the staff for a late check out which they gave for a small fee.
Thank u guys for a awesome stay will highly recommend you to all my family and friends.
Convenient for what we needed for the one night.

They have lazy and gossip of groups of cleaner,room since 1st day checked in have alot ants and pieces of rubbish on the floor,was cleaned unproperly , abounch of cleaners, rather just hire 1 or 2 friendly and do proper work staff
The park has great facilities for kids, had an ant problem in the kitchen but the weather was so hot, so may not have helped.  Quiet location and could take our dog and stay in cabin.
an oasis in the middle of nowhere
Loved the 2 bdrm Villa. Very helpful and accommodating with after hours check in.

Stayed two nights,attended a wedding which was about 20 minutes away.
Villa was clean but required some maintenance. The villa had everything that one needed microwave,kettle,blankets,milk, coffee & tea plus Wi Fi also supplied.
Barbeque supplied on the verandah, table & chairs plus all cutlery & dishes.
The roadways inside the park needed work, extremely rough with a lot pot holes.
Very good communication & assistance from the office,I appreciated the service I received.
Has a large pool & parking is very good.
Very central to  numerous shopping centres & restaurants.
Would fully recommend a stay there.
We took our grandkids on a road trip Qld to Vic in our caravan. This was the best caravan park we have ever stayed in.
Peaceful location, nice swimming pool, clean cabins and very comfortable beds. Quiet. Close to train station and shops.
A lovely camp site located in a very quiet & pretty area. Nicely nestled away from residential areas & busy roads. There is a fantastic swimming pool with spa pool.
Friendly staff everything is easy to use and find
Enjoyed our stay very much
We liked our stay at vineyard. Bed very comfortable but needs to be proped up with broom to stop moving when watching tv.
Staying on a basic caravan site. Excellent service, lovely staff and environment.

Was not very happy where this park was located in an industrial area. Laundry filthy, Showers below par in regard to water wetting entire cubicle, where I found I had to leave cubicle to dress lower part of myself, so clothing never got wet from dragging on the floor. Far too expensive. Actually, from travelling from WA to Sunshine Coast was the most expensive of the entire trip. Our trip included beachside parks for less than half we paid at this Van Park.
Fabulous place will be back
Lovely clean rooms. Wonderfully pet friendly.
Enjoyed my stay, very handy to the Hawkesbury.

Bunnings, ALDI and so many other businesses close by. Bus service from the gate. Train station not far away.
Very quiet. I had a powered site right down the back. Peaceful, lots of trees, bush, birds.
Laundry and amenities block clean and functional.
Lovely pool/spa area. Games room for kids.
Reception staff absolutely lovely, friendly and welcoming.
Our stay was in May 2023 and would like to say it was a great stay. The park was looking awesome and the staff as always were friendly and welcoming.

Stayed here in our caravan on a powered site. Very expensive for water and power. Toilet/showers have been renewed but poorly fitted, no separation between shower
and dressing area, no soap holder, water runs out of shower to toilet cubicles. Camp kitchen terrible.
Expensive for its location and accommodation. Wasn't happy that a 2 person cabin had double bunks  in the living area and no table and chairs.
